title: rhodiola alsia subsp. alsia
intro: Rhodiola alsia subsp. alsia, also known as Rhodiola rosea, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family and is native to the Arctic regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rhodiola alsia subsp. alsia include reduced stress and anxiety, improved mental performance and mood, and enhanced physical performance. Herbal preparations of Rhodiola alsia subsp. alsia include capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support mental and physical well-being.
